revision.text: Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to instantiate the template in its collapsed (hidden) state. [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to instantiate the template in its collapsed (hidden) state.{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to instantiate the template in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed state.

{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to instantiate the template in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state. Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{/doc}}

revision.comment: instantiate is a word.... but not the right one for this instance....!
revision.text:
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to include the template so that it initially displays in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.{{template doc}}

revision.comment: formatting (improved handling for long template names)
revision.text:
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to include the template so that it initially displays in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.
{{template doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclude]] this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}}  to transclude this template in its expanded (uncollapsed) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to transclude this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{template doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (uncollapsed) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. (This is the usual default.)

{{template doc}}

revision.comment: - pointless formatting, allow stating unusual defaults
revision.text:
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}} to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is the usual default.) {{template doc}}

revision.comment: added "Note to editors on how to manage collapsibility"; removed superfluous line breaks; replaced <code> with <tt>
revision.text: '''Note to editors on how to manage collapsibility:''' *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=collapsed}}</tt> to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=expanded}}</tt> to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=autocollapse}}</tt> to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''only if''' there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is usually the default.)<noinclude> {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}} <!-- add categories, interwiki links etc on the bottom of /doc page, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Per request at talk page; content copied from [[Template:Collapsible option/sandbox]]
revision.text: ; {{larger|How to manage this template's visibility}} * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''only if''' there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is usually the default, i.e. doesn't usually need specifying.) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: update, per [[Template talk:Collapsible option#Edit request on 12 February 2013]]
revision.text: ; {{larger|How to manage this template's visibility}} * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''''only if''''' there is another template of the same type on the page. * {{#if:{{{state|{{{default|}}}}}} | '''{{{state|{{{default}}}}}}''' has been set as | Unless set otherwise (see ''state'' parameter within the template's code), autocollapse is }} the default state. {{documentation}}

avoid template redirect in heavily used template

revision.text:
'''How to manage this template's initial visibility'''
{| class="nowrap" style="margin:0;border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;border:none;padding:0;" |colspan="2"| * To manage this template's initial visibility, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]] ... | '''Example''' |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;padding-right:2.5em;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed |style="padding-right:1.5em;"| ... to show it in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar. |style="font-family:monospace;"| {{braces |{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}} |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded | ... to show it in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible. |style="font-family:monospace;"| {{braces |{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}} |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse |style="line-height:1.35em;"| ... to show it in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another

How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]]... : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}... to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar – for example,{{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}}}; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}... to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible – for example, {{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}}}; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}... to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page – for example, {{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}}}. {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | {{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}} ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

<div> to ensure template starts as new section, replaced ellipsis with colon
revision.text:
How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]]: : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}} ..........  to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}} ............  to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}} ....  to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page. {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | {{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}} ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the{{plaincode|state}}parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is{{plaincode|autocollapse}}. }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]]{{thinsp}}... : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}} ..........  to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed{{))}}}}); : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}} ............  to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded{{))}}}}); : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}} ....  to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse{{))}}}}). {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | {{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}} ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Template#Parameters|add the parameter]]: : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed{{))}}}}; : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded{{))}}}}; : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse{{))}}}}. {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | '''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}''' ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }} {{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{!}}align=''vlaue'' is also available; where ''value'' can be either ''right'' or ''left''. The default is center }} {{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{!}}width=''vlaue'' is also available; where ''value'' can be either ''N [em/%/px]'' or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: fix excessive newlines creating large gap at bottom of transclusion
Allow changing the default state specified per the documentation
restore removed parameter nobase per TPER
improvements to wording agreed on talk page
emphasize default state - we find many of these incorrectly documented

revision.text:
'''{{big|Initial visibility:}}''' currently defaults to '''{{big|{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}}}''' To set the template's initial visibility, the {{para|state}} [[Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] may be used:
  • {{para|state|collapsed}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}}| |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=collapsed}} to show the template collapsed, i.e., hidden apart from its title bar
  • {{para|state|expanded}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=expanded}} to show the template expanded, i.e., fully visible
  • {{para|state|autocollapse}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=autocollapse}}
    • shows the template collapsed to the title bar if there is a {{navbar}}, a {{sidebar}}, or some other table on the page with the collapsible attribute
    • shows the template in its expanded state if there are no other collapsible items on the page
If the {{para|state}} parameter is not set, the template's initial visibility is taken from the {{para|default}} parameter in this ''Collapsible option'' template. For the template on this page, that currently evaluates to {{big|'''{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}'''}}.{{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{para|align|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either right or left. The default is center }}{{#if:{{{title-background|}}}|:{{para|title-background|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either navbox or a color. The default is none and navbox defaults to the default navbox color. }}{{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{para|width|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either N [em/%/px] or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Implement overhaul for readability, per [[WP:SILENTCONSENSUS|silent consensus]] at talk [[Special:Permalink/1166630468#Readability_overhaul|here]].
use syntaxhighlight tag instead of code tag
Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude these editnotice pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1253961354|1253961354]] by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]). Use sandbox other instead; unused navboxes should still show up in the report.
1 revision imported: trying to fix the navbars
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:42:37 on [[Template:Collapsible option]]
revision.text: Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to instantiate the template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to instantiate the template in its collapsed (hidden) state. [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to instantiate the template in its collapsed (hidden) state.{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to instantiate the template in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed state.

{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to instantiate the template in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state. Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{/doc}}

revision.comment:
+
(so relatively long statement near start of a line, hence less likely to cause large wrap)
revision.text:
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to instantiate the template in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{/doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.{{template doc}}

revision.comment: instantiate is a word.... but not the right one for this instance....!
revision.text:
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to include the template so that it initially displays in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.{{template doc}}

revision.comment: formatting (improved handling for long template names)
revision.text:
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  or  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}}  to include the template so that it initially displays in, respectively, its collapsed (hidden) or uncollapsed (expanded) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to collapse the template only if there is another template of the same type on the page.
{{template doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to [[Wikipedia:Transclusion|transclude]] this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}}  to transclude this template in its expanded (uncollapsed) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to transclude this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page.

{{template doc}}

Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (uncollapsed) state.
Use  {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. (This is the usual default.)

{{template doc}}

revision.comment: - pointless formatting, allow stating unusual defaults
revision.text:
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}} to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is the usual default.) {{template doc}}

Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}} to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is the default.) {{template doc}}

revision.comment: chaning from "expanded" to "uncollapsed" for consistent naming
revision.text:
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=uncollapsed}} to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is the default.) {{template doc}}

revision.comment: slightly smaller font-size for more widely-spaced <code> text, +alternate parameter name
revision.text:
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=collapsed}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=expanded}} to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state.
Use {{{{PAGENAME}}''Template name''|state=autocollapse}} to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state only if there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|{{{default|This}}}}}} is the default.) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: added "Note to editors on how to manage collapsibility"; removed superfluous line breaks; replaced <code> with <tt>
revision.text: '''Note to editors on how to manage collapsibility:''' *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=collapsed}}</tt> to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=expanded}}</tt> to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. *Use <tt>{{<!-- --><includeonly>{{PAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>''Template name''</noinclude>|state=autocollapse}}</tt> to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''only if''' there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is usually the default.)<noinclude> {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}} <!-- add categories, interwiki links etc on the bottom of /doc page, not here --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Per request at talk page; content copied from [[Template:Collapsible option/sandbox]]
revision.text: ; {{larger|How to manage this template's visibility}} * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''only if''' there is another template of the same type on the page. ({{{state|This}}} is usually the default, i.e. doesn't usually need specifying.) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: update, per [[Template talk:Collapsible option#Edit request on 12 February 2013]]
revision.text: ; {{larger|How to manage this template's visibility}} * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''''only if''''' there is another template of the same type on the page. * {{#if:{{{state|{{{default|}}}}}} | '''{{{state|{{{default}}}}}}''' has been set as | Unless set otherwise (see ''state'' parameter within the template's code), autocollapse is }} the default state. {{documentation}}

{{larger|'''How to manage this template's visibility'''}} * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}  to show this template in its expanded (fully visible) state. * Use {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}''Template name'' |{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}  to show this template in its collapsed (hidden) state '''''only if''''' there is another template of the same type on the page. * {{#if:{{{state|{{{default|}}}}}} | '''{{{state|{{{default}}}}}}''' has been set as | Unless set otherwise (see ''state'' parameter within the template's code), autocollapse is }} the default state. {{documentation}}

avoid template redirect in heavily used template
Update via sandbox/testcases (primarily to satisfy [[Template talk:Collapsible option#Rephrasing]])
revision.text:
'''How to manage this template's initial visibility'''
{| class="nowrap" style="margin:0;border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;border:none;padding:0;" |colspan="2"| * To manage this template's initial visibility, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]] ... | '''Example''' |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;padding-right:2.5em;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed |style="padding-right:1.5em;"| ... to show it in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar. |style="font-family:monospace;"| {{braces |{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}} |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded | ... to show it in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible. |style="font-family:monospace;"| {{braces |{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}} |- style="vertical-align:top;" |style="padding-left:2.8em;font-family:monospace;"| {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse |style="line-height:1.35em;"| ... to show it in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another
... template of the same type on the page. |style="font-family:monospace;"| {{braces |{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}} |} * {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | ''{{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}}has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the{{plaincode|state}}parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is{{plaincode|autocollapse.}} }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]]... : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}... to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar – for example,{{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}}}}; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}... to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible – for example, {{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}}}}; : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}... to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page – for example, {{plaincode|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}}}}. {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | {{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}} ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

How to manage this template's initial visibility

To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Templates#Parameters|add the parameter]]{{thinsp}}... : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed}} ..........  to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed{{))}}}}); : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded}} ............  to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded{{))}}}}); : {{plaincode|{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse}} ....  to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page (e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse{{))}}}}). {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | {{plaincode|'''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}'''}} ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }}{{When on template page | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

How to manage this template's initial visibility
To manage this template's visibility when it first appears, [[Help:Template#Parameters|add the parameter]]: : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed to show the template in its collapsed state, i.e. hidden apart from its titlebar – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}collapsed{{))}}}}; : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded to show the template in its expanded state, i.e. fully visible – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}expanded{{))}}}}; : {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse to show the template in its collapsed state ''but only if'' there is another template of the same type on the page – e.g. {{mono|100%|{{((}}{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}} {{!}}{{#ifeq:{{{statename|}}}|optional | |state=}}autocollapse{{))}}}}. {{#if:{{{state|}}}{{{default|}}} | '''{{#if:{{{state|}}} |{{{state}}} |{{{default}}}}}''' ''has been set as the default state.'' | Unless set otherwise (see the {{mono|100%|state}} parameter in the template's code), the template's default state is {{mono|100%|autocollapse}}. }} {{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{!}}align=''vlaue'' is also available; where ''value'' can be either ''right'' or ''left''. The default is center }} {{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{!}}width=''vlaue'' is also available; where ''value'' can be either ''N [em/%/px]'' or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
'''{{big|Initial visibility:}}''' currently defaults to '''{{big|{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}}}''' To set the template's initial visibility, the {{para|state}} [[Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] may be used:
  • {{para|state|collapsed}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}}| |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=collapsed}} to show the template collapsed, i.e., hidden apart from its title bar
  • {{para|state|expanded}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=expanded}} to show the template expanded, i.e., fully visible
  • {{para|state|autocollapse}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=autocollapse}}
    • shows the template collapsed to the title bar if there is a {{navbar}}, a {{sidebar}}, or some other table on the page with the collapsible attribute
    • shows the template in its expanded state if there are no other collapsible items on the page
If the {{para|state}} parameter is not set, the template's initial visibility is taken from the {{para|default}} parameter in this ''Collapsible option'' template. For the template on this page, that currently evaluates to {{big|'''{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}'''}}.{{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{para|align|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either right or left. The default is center }}{{#if:{{{title-background|}}}|:{{para|title-background|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either navbox or a color. The default is none and navbox defaults to the default navbox color. }}{{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{para|width|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either N [em/%/px] or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

'''{{big|Initial visibility:}}''' currently defaults to '''{{big|{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}}}''' To set this template's initial visibility, the {{para|state}} [[Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] may be used:
  • {{para|state|collapsed}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}}| |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=collapsed}} to show the template collapsed, i.e., hidden apart from its title bar
  • {{para|state|expanded}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=expanded}} to show the template expanded, i.e., fully visible
  • {{para|state|autocollapse}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|state=autocollapse}}
    • shows the template collapsed to the title bar if there is a {{navbar}}, a {{sidebar}}, or some other table on the page with the collapsible attribute
    • shows the template in its expanded state if there are no other collapsible items on the page
If the {{para|state}} parameter in the template on this page is not set, the template's initial visibility is taken from the {{para|default}} parameter in the ''Collapsible option'' template. For the template on this page, that currently evaluates to {{big|'''{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}'''}}.{{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{para|align|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either right or left. The default is center }}{{#if:{{{title-background|}}}|:{{para|title-background|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either navbox or a color. The default is none and navbox defaults to the default navbox color. }}{{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{para|width|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either N [em/%/px] or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

'''{{big|Initial visibility:}}''' currently defaults to '''{{big|{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}}}''' To set this template's initial visibility, the {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}}} [[Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] may be used:
  • {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}|collapsed}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}}| |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=collapsed}} to show the template collapsed, i.e., hidden apart from its title bar
  • {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}|expanded}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=expanded}} to show the template expanded, i.e., fully visible
  • {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}|autocollapse}}: {{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=autocollapse}}
    • shows the template collapsed to the title bar if there is a {{navbar}}, a {{sidebar}}, or some other table on the page with the collapsible attribute
    • shows the template in its expanded state if there are no other collapsible items on the page
If the {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}}} parameter in the template on this page is not set, the template's initial visibility is taken from the {{para|default}} parameter in the ''Collapsible option'' template. For the template on this page, that currently evaluates to {{big|'''{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}'''}}.{{#if:{{{align|}}}| :{{para|align|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either right or left. The default is center }}{{#if:{{{title-background|}}}|:{{para|title-background|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either navbox or a color. The default is none and navbox defaults to the default navbox color. }}{{#if:{{{width|}}}| :{{para|width|''value''}} is also available; where ''value'' can be either N [em/%/px] or auto. The default is 100% }}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Implement overhaul for readability, per [[WP:SILENTCONSENSUS|silent consensus]] at talk [[Special:Permalink/1166630468#Readability_overhaul|here]].
use syntaxhighlight tag instead of code tag
Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude these editnotice pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1253961354|1253961354]] by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]). Use sandbox other instead; unused navboxes should still show up in the report.
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsible_option here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
This template's '''initial visibility currently defaults to {{param value|{{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=collapsed|expanded=expanded|autocollapse|#default=autocollapse}}}}''', meaning that {{#switch:{{{default|}}}|collapsed=it is hidden apart from its title bar.|expanded=it is fully visible.|autocollapse|#default=if there is another collapsible item on the page (a [[Wikipedia:Navigation_template#Types|navbox, sidebar]], or [[Help:Collapsing tables and more|table with the collapsible attribute]]), it is hidden apart from its title bar; if not, it is fully visible.}} To change this template's initial visibility, the {{para|{{{parameter_name|state}}}}} [[Help:Template#Parameters|parameter]] may be used:
    {{#ifeq:{{{default|}}}|collapsed||
  • {{#tag:syntaxhighlight|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}}| |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=collapsed}}|lang=wikitext|inline=1}} will show the template collapsed, i.e. hidden apart from its title bar.
    • }} {{#ifeq:{{{default|}}}|expanded||
  • {{#tag:syntaxhighlight|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=expanded}}|lang=wikitext|inline=1}} will show the template expanded, i.e. fully visible.
    • }} {{#ifeq:{{{default|autocollapse}}}|autocollapse||
  • {{#tag:syntaxhighlight|{{{{{{#if:{{{nobase|}}} | |BASE}}PAGENAME}}|{{{parameter_name|state}}}=autocollapse}}|lang=wikitext|inline=1}} will show the template autocollapsed, i.e. if there is another collapsible item on the page (a [[Wikipedia:Navigation_template#Types|navbox, sidebar]], or [[Help:Collapsing|table with the collapsible attribute]]), it is hidden apart from its title bar, but if not, it is fully visible.
    • }}
{{#if:{{{align|}}}|{{para|align|{{var|value}}}} is also available; where {{var|value}} can be either right or left. The default is {{kbd|center}}. }}{{#if:{{{title-background|}}}|{{para|title-background|{{var|value}}}} is also available; where {{var|value}} can be either {{kbd|navbox}} or a {{kbd|color}}. The default is {{kbd|none}}, and {{{kbd|navbox}}} defaults to the default navbox color. }}{{#if:{{{width|}}}| {{para|width|{{var|value}}}} is also available; where {{var|value}} can be either {{kbd|{{var|N}} [em/%/px]}} or {{kbd|auto}}. The default is {{kbd|100%}}. }}{{sandbox other|__EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__}}{{template other | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |{{pp-template|docusage=yes}} | {{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |{{pp-move|docusage=yes|small=yes}} }} }} }} {{Documentation}}
